utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items required in the format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All five appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: The format requires each of the first four categories to include insurance with costs; the plan names and monthly costs are provided for health, property, and travel. Additional services include a description and cost. For total_budget, the format requests a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; the plan only provides total_monthly_cost and lacks annual cost, so this item is not fully specified according to 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown.' The other four items meet the requirement of including costs, though details of coverage terms aren’t explicitly required by the format beyond naming and costs. Therefore, 4 of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three specific plan names to map: LifeFirst Standard Package (Physical & Mental Health), PrimeHome Premium Coverage (for Professional Equipment), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan + Adventure Travel Coverage Add-on. From the ground truth, the closest matching items are: LifeFirst Standard Plan (health physical has rating 9; mental health LifeFirst Standard Plan has rating 4). Since it's a combined 'Physical & Mental Health' package under LifeFirst Standard, we map to both corresponding LifeFirst Standard Plan ratings: 9 (physical) and 4 (mental). For property, PrimeHome Premium Coverage matches exactly with rating 3. For travel, PrimeTravel Premium Plan matches exactly with rating 3, and the add-on Adventure Travel Coverage matches exactly with rating 10.
